scope: full source package with intelligent closure iteration and cross-platform startup repair
rootCause: previous temporary launcher assumed frontend/ although the actual frontend is apps/web/
previous temporary launcher printed status text but did not execute the original API/worker/frontend lifecycle
the original launcher used Bash 4 mapfile, unavailable in macOS Bash 3.2

validation.bash32UnsupportedBuiltinScan: pass: no mapfile/readarray/declare -A in startup launcher

notes: The validation environment did not contain meshio and ezdxf, so the real backend was not launched there.
The user-provided environment log reports all PitGuard backend dependencies as OK; the complete lifecycle was validated with controlled process mocks.
